_comment: test-driven — enforces test coverage and runs tests automatically on every relevant change.

onFileSave.prompt:
Source file saved: {{file}}

1. Call getDiagnostics on {{file}} — report any errors
2. Call runTests (filtered to tests matching this file if possible)
3. If no test file exists for {{file}}, call generateTests to scaffold one
Report: error count, test pass/fail, coverage note.

onDiagnosticsCleared.prompt: Error cleared in {{file}}. Run the tests for that file to confirm the fix is correct and no regressions were introduced.

onTestRun.prompt:
{{failed}} test(s) failed out of {{total}}.

Failed:
{{failures}}

1. Call getDiagnostics on each failing test file
2. Call getCallHierarchy (incoming) on the first failing symbol to trace the root cause
3. Suggest the minimal fix — do not change test expectations unless the contract genuinely changed

onBranchCheckout.prompt:
Switched to {{branch}} from {{previousBranch}}.

Baseline check: getDiagnostics (error count), then runTests. Report: branch, error count, test pass/fail in ≤5 lines.

onPostCompact.prompt: Context compacted. Re-orient: getGitStatus (branch/changes), getDiagnostics (errors), getHandoffNote. Summarize in ≤8 lines.
